records.title: World Bank Real-Time Food Prices - Kenya
records.message: No stable direct CSV. Open the Real Time Food Prices study, use Get Microdata to download the Kenya file (KEN_2021_RTFP_v02_M) or the global by-country file (WLD_2021_RTFP-CTRY_v02_M), then drop the CSV in data/external/wb_rtfp/ and re-run --build-only. The prices transform reads it and filters to KEN.

records.title: Kenya Demographic and Health Survey 2022
records.message: Register at dhsprogram.com, request the Kenya 2022 datasets, then in R: library(rdhs); set_rdhs_config(email=..., project=...); get_datasets(c('KEHR8BFL','KEPR8BFL','KEKR8BFL','KEIR8BFL','KEMR8BFL')). Place the extracted .DTA/.SAV files in data/external/kdhs_2022/.

records.title: FAOLEX Kenya legal and policy corpus
records.message: FAOLEX lacks a bulk API. Use the Kenya country profile to export the food/nutrition, land/soil, water, environment and social-protection record lists, then store abstracts + PDFs in data/external/faolex/.

records.title: Global Fortification Data Exchange (Kenya)
records.message: Export the Kenya dashboard (maize flour, oil, rice, salt, wheat flour) from https://www.fortificationdata.org into data/external/gfdx/.
